item.title: Never forget Aitzaz Hasan
item.description: The fearless young hero who stopped a suicide bomber from entering his school and saved hundreds of lives, 2014 On January 6th, 2014, 15-year-old Aitzaz Hasan looked death right in its eyes and challenged it. The young man was attending his high school in Hangu Village in Pakistan, which had a reputation for anti-terrorist attitudes. The school had an estimated student body of 2,000 students. As he was walking to school with two friends, Hasan noticed a suspicious man walking towards the school, who seemed like he was carrying something under his clothes. Hasan and his friends then noticed there was a detonator attached to under the man's clothing. This mysterious man was a suicide bomber who was about to walk into the school to murder as many children as possible. Hasan made his way towards the terrorist while ignoring his friend's pleas not to. Hasan said to them "I'm going to stop him, he is going to school to kill my friends". Hasan's friends ran inside the school to raise the alarm. Hasan, however, stood his ground. He threw a rock at his attacker but missed. With no other options, Hasan charged the terrorist and tackled him to the ground. In response, the terrorist activated the detonator, killing himself as well as Hasan. Hasan was the only death as a result of the blast. His heroic actions saved many lives that day. His school was renamed Aitzaz Hasan Shaheed High School. General of the army staff Raheel Sharif said that Aitzaz Hasan is "a national hero, who has sacrificed his today for our tomorrow." He is also described as a "symbol of resistance against terrorism." He has also been named as a martyr of Pakistan. He also received an award for his bravery. Hasan's family was given compensation. His father said, "My son made his mother cry but saved hundreds of mothers from crying for their children." The 2016 film, Salute, is based on Hasan and his heroic actions.
item.dc:creator: maureoko

item.title: The 368th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - D&D MeeMays ep 3
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Starting January 1st, I will have a new Signature Image. One I had commissioned. It's so cute. FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #DandD #DandDump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: My 8th Cake Day contribution
item.description:
Susi Vidal
GD burger I don’t typically post anything, and my favorites are typically recipes, books, stuff that made me laugh, or the occasional beautiful woman. So since it’s apparently my Cake Day I decided to post two from my favorites that hit a lot of those favorites… a beautiful woman, cooking, and making me laugh. The post I got this from says you can find more of her “OnlyPans” videos at https://instagram.com/susividal and that her name is Susi Vidal, but I don’t use Instagram so I make no promises. I hope you all have a great year and a safe and happy Holiday.

item.title: I'm a mostly WFH worker, but..
item.description: Kind of just shouting into the void as I am constantly thinking about these things and ways to improve the quality of life for everyone, sometimes it's good to have feedback and hear different POV in order to keep improving those ideas. It's almost a hobby, I guess, but probably just an exercise in futility. It's no secret that most people lose a lot of their own time to having to commute to work and then have to decide whether to use their remaining personal time for chores and basic tasks to stay healthy or to neglect all of that and have some pleasure time. The 8-8-8 hour, work-personal-sleep day cycle is no longer a viable or fair system in the modern age, and we are constantly losing more of our personal time due to being increasingly exploited by the rich and powerful for no other reason than pure human greed. There would be many immediate and flow on effects that would benefit society as a whole and improve everyone's quality of life. We need to evolve past these basic human desires of greed, hate (justifications to harm one another) and lust for power, stop treating each other as the enemy or as simply a thing to be exploited, and unite under a common enemy - human suffering - and start trying to improve the quality of life for all, including future generations.

item.title: Images of Note: gertie
item.description:
I came across a photo of a place someone claimed was Edinburgh and I was like "Bestie I have lived here all of my life, that is not Edinburgh that is Lichtenstein."
the possum seems to much sadder now :(
THEY DID NOT HAVE MY NAME
I love Corgis
You can just add Peter to anything and it would just be like "what the fuck"
This is a very good way of doing things.
Proto TBH creature
Satan
I want this to be the first thing I say in the morning.
I'm calling out all Shane fans in the Dump now. There are SO many better singletons in Stardew. SO MANY! I get it. His smile is a thing to behold, but consider that Leah lives in the same area as him and her liked gifts are all foragables.
Goats are great but also criminals
PISS
no?
Pipe Bomb =w=
:3
Remember this when your friend has a baby: BRING THEM THESE THINGS.
This looks like some really fucked up Gay Porn.
poyo
Tag your friends. >:3
Mood
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay

item.title: I made this for my partners holiday present
item.description: Medium: stained glass This is narsil blade that was broken Made my own pattern then cut out all the glass and the soldered. Took about two days to make. Hope yall enjoy.

item.title: It's meme dump day... Again... Vol 88
item.description:
Oof, helloooo friends. Been feeling big time like this lately and now I am sick with a minor cold and it just feels like the last straw.
Hobbes' tummy is a real life saver.
Good source.
.
I have no idea why that says ted Cruz lol I did not notice that before.
Yes
Ugh I have felt a giant wellspring of words trapped in my chest lately and they just will not emerge
@GingerSnark I know I sent this to you already, but it does make me think of you every time.
.
Lol I am basically Pooh in that frame right now.
Welllll some of it.
.
Oh tumblr.
I love hearing about people's musical interests.
They're here to recover my mangled corpse.
Worth it.
Sign me the fuck up.
Appropriate to the circumstances, definitely. Plus I'm already on the maximum dose so what can ya do.
Living in daydreams.
How I've felt since reading the Bible as a kid. My family still doesn't get why I won't come back to church.
Also yeah it's more hilarious to be a terrible person (but like in a funny way not in an actually terrible way.)
Sent this to my siblings immediately. Ahh the good old days.
Nooo let me stay one with the moss.
This is where I post from
Ooops.
Yum.
Who is to say it's not a bit of both?
I need more weed though.
My kind of party.
.
Hmmm. Please don't mark me mature this time, it completely killed my last dump.
It will be fine, come on.
.
The best.
.
My husband 1000%
Repeat after me: Nobody wants unsolicited dick pics.
Look at that precious trouble maker.
Ok tbh this is a killer line.
Soup!
....damnit.
This used to be me but now I've just given in to the dramatic and start with a giant wing.
Fuck, someone get me a cane.
Bah, indeed.
.
Do they though
Bro.
Art tax from the archives.
Hobbes being my little caretaker
He is just always on top of me. Making sure I'm okay and also available to pet his face whenever he desires. I hope you're having an okay week, imgur :)

item.title: Hit & Run in Portland, Oregon.
item.description: A young woman with three of her young children in the car was struck by a 1999ish Dodge Dakota (2wd). Video is not my own, I obtained it from the camera car's dashcam to send to the victim, as I'm the only one who knew how to quickly do that.

item.title: Shitty American Healthcare System is Shitty

I can’t say anything nice about the American healthcare system, in general, or Humana, specifically,
so I’m not going to say anything at all.
